title: MouseKeyInventoryFix
description: Fixes the almost ten-year-old issue with mouse key binds not working in inventories.
body:
[![Discord](https://discordapp.com/api/guilds/959153592869224579/widget.png?style=banner2)](https://discord.gg/qpc69BUeDe)

## MouseKeyInventoryFix
Fixes the almost ten-year-old issue with mouse key binds not working in inventories ([MC-577](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-577)).
\
\
**There are jars for both Fabric and Forge, along with some for specific game versions. Make sure you get the correct one for your mod loader and game version.**

## Having issues or have questions?
Join my [Discord server](https://discord.gg/qpc69BUeDe) and ask!
